content: I completed the copilot-cli analysis and wrote target/temp/swarmout/copilot_cli_analysis.md and artifacts under target/temp/swarmout/copilot_cli_artifacts/. I attempted to mark task 's3' complete but the system reports it's assigned to tm-005. Please either reassign s3 to me (tm-003) or ask tm-005 to mark it complete so I can call team_task_complete and pick up more work.

Hi — I attempted to claim task s6 (compose SWARMOUT2.md) but the task system rejected the claim due to unsatisfied dependencies s1..s5. I have already read and consumed the competitor/product analysis files in target/temp/swarmout and created a merged_artifacts placeholder (target/temp/swarmout/merged_artifacts/merged_sources.txt). The consolidated document target/temp/swarmout/SWARMOUT2.md already exists and appears to meet the requested structure.

Please advise:
- If you want me to proceed anyway, could you either mark the dependencies as satisfied or assign s6 directly to me (team_assign_task)?
- Alternatively, shall I wait for s1..s5 to be marked complete before claiming and then I will call team_task_complete? 

I’m ready to finalize any edits to SWARMOUT2.md or to break it into issue tickets / GitHub-ready tasks once I have assignment. — swarm-s6
